notes: Axum HTTP server hosting KernelRouter, service mesh, supervisor, and PTY bridge
Central event routing with namespace-scoped delivery, actor stores, mailboxes, and snapshots
SQLite-backed append-only event store with envelope, validator, filter, and cursor
Actor create, wake, sleep, stop, crash events with supervisor restart logic
Headless service actors for mesh, human gateway, and sync
REST endpoints for mesh register, send, broadcast, discover, status, and SSE events
Read-only REST API for Studio: workspaces, sessions, agents, and SSE event stream
Workspace start, job dispatch, terminal launcher, and tmux session management
WebSocket-to-tmux PTY bridge for workspace terminal access
Telegram adapter for human-in-the-loop notifications via job events
REST endpoints for session files, git status/diff/log, agents, skills, and workspace activation
Event-driven job dispatch subscribing to job events from the kernel
Global singleton kernel router initialization from ~/.ship/ directory
SQLite database with KV store, actor events, session events, workspace state, and ADR storage
